nasb.text: The fat and the kidneys and the lobe of the liver of the sin offering, he then offered up in smoke on the altar just as the Lord had commanded Moses.

esv.text: But the fat and the kidneys and the long lobe of the liver from the sin offering he burned on the altar, as the Lord commanded Moses.

cnv.text: 贖罪祭牲的脂肪、腎和肝葉，他都焚燒在祭壇上，都是照著耶和華吩咐摩西的。

ccb.text: 他照耶和华对摩西的吩咐，在坛上焚烧牛犊的脂肪、肾脏和肝叶，
